metadata.description: Command-aware semantic compression of agent tool output, applied as a PostToolUse hook.

plugins.name: semtrim
plugins.description: Replaces blind head+tail truncation with Boost-style, command-aware compression of tool output before it enters context. Per-command filters (gh, docker, npm-family, go, cargo, bundlers, pytest/jest/vitest, git, linters) plus a generic ANSI+dedup+salience fallback. Deterministic and cache-safe; never blocks.
